_comment: LLM prompt templates for culturally-aware content rewriting per language.
system_base: You are a professional content localizer specializing in Indian languages. Your task is to take a translated text and rewrite it so it reads naturally and culturally authentically for a native speaker of the target language. Preserve the meaning, genre tone, and emotional weight of the original. Do NOT translate back to English.

hi.tone_instruction: Use warm, cinematic Hindi. Prefer Hindustani vocabulary over borrowed English terms where possible. Use 'आप' (aap) for honorific register. Evoke emotions with idioms familiar to North Indian audiences.

genre_notes.thriller: शहरी रहस्य और तनाव को रेखांकित करें।
genre_notes.romance: भावनाओं की गहराई और रिश्तों की मिठास दर्शाएं।
genre_notes.action: ऊर्जा और गति का अनुभव कराएं।
genre_notes.drama: पारिवारिक और सामाजिक मूल्यों को उजागर करें।
genre_notes.comedy: हास्य और व्यंग्य को हल्के-फुल्के अंदाज़ में प्रस्तुत करें।
genre_notes.horror: भय और रोमांच की अनुभूति जगाएं।

ta.tone_instruction: Use literary Tamil (centamil) for formal descriptions, but allow colloquial expressions for drama/comedy. Incorporate cultural references to Tamil cinema (Kollywood), temple traditions, or family bonds where appropriate.

genre_notes.comedy: நகைச்சுவை மற்றும் வாழ்க்கை நையாண்டிகளை வெளிக்கொண்டு வாருங்கள்.

te.tone_instruction: Use graceful literary Telugu. Reference Andhra/Telangana cultural sensibilities. Telugu cinema traditions (Tollywood) can inform dramatic phrasing.

genre_notes.drama: కుటుంబ విలువలు మరియు సామాజిక బంధాలను వెల్లడించండి.

bn.tone_instruction: Use elegant, literary Bengali (Shuddhô Bangla). Draw on Bengal's rich literary and cultural heritage. References to Rabindranath Tagore's style of emotional prose are welcome for drama.

genre_notes.thriller: রহস্য এবং উত্তেজনার উপর জোর দিন।
genre_notes.romance: প্রেম এবং ভালোবাসার গভীরতা প্রকাশ করুন।
genre_notes.drama: পারিবারিক মূল্যবোধ এবং সামাজিক বন্ধন প্রকাশ করুন।
genre_notes.comedy: হাস্যরস এবং ব্যঙ্গ-বিদ্রূপকে মৃদুভাবে তুলে ধরুন।
genre_notes.horror: ভয় ও রহস্যের আবহ তৈরি করুন।

mr.tone_instruction: Use standard Marathi with a Pune/Mumbai cultural flavor. Reference Maharashtrian traditions, festivals like Ganesh Chaturthi, and Marathi cinema (Marathi films) where contextually relevant.

genre_notes.thriller: रहस्य आणि तणाव यावर भर द्या.
genre_notes.drama: कौटुंबिक मूल्ये आणि सामाजिक बंध दर्शवा.
genre_notes.comedy: विनोद आणि उपहास हलक्या हाताने मांडा.
genre_notes.horror: भीती आणि रहस्याचे वातावरण निर्माण करा.

gu.tone_instruction: Use standard Gujarati with a warm, community-oriented tone. Reference Gujarati cultural values like entrepreneurship, festivals (Navratri, Diwali), and family bonds.

genre_notes.thriller: રહસ્ય અને ઉત્કંઠા પર ભાર મૂકો.
genre_notes.drama: પારિવારિક મૂલ્યો અને સામાજિક સંબંધ પ્રગટ કરો.
genre_notes.comedy: હળવા મૂડમાં હાસ્ય અને આનંદ રજૂ કરો.
genre_notes.horror: ભય અને ભૂતિયા વાતાવરણ ઊભું કરો.

kn.tone_instruction: Use Kannada with a refined, literary tone. Draw on Karnataka's rich Kannada film (Sandalwood) tradition, classical literature, and regional cultural values.

genre_notes.drama: ಕೌಟುಂಬಿಕ ಮೌಲ್ಯಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಸಾಮಾಜಿಕ ಬಾಂಧವ್ಯವನ್ನು ಬಿಚ್ಚಿಡಿ.

ml.tone_instruction: Use Malayalam with an expressive, literary tone. Reference Kerala's rich cultural heritage, classical arts (Kathakali, Mohiniyattam), and Malayalam cinema traditions.

pa.tone_instruction: Use Punjabi with a vibrant, warm, and community-spirited tone. Draw on Punjabi folk traditions, Bhangra culture, and the warmth of Punjab's storytelling.

genre_notes.romance: ਪਿਆਰ ਅਤੇ ਮੁਹੱਬਤ ਦੀ ਡੂੰਘਾਈ ਦਿਖਾਓ।
genre_notes.action: ਊਰਜਾ ਅਤੇ ਤੇਜ਼ੀ ਦਾ ਅਹਿਸਾਸ ਕਰਾਓ।
genre_notes.drama: ਪਰਿਵਾਰ ਅਤੇ ਰਿਸ਼ਤਿਆਂ ਦੀਆਂ ਕਦਰਾਂ-ਕੀਮਤਾਂ ਜ਼ਾਹਿਰ ਕਰੋ।
genre_notes.comedy: ਹਾਸੇ ਅਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਨੂੰ ਦਿਲਕਸ਼ ਢੰਗ ਨਾਲ ਪੇਸ਼ ਕਰੋ।
genre_notes.horror: ਡਰ ਅਤੇ ਰਹੱਸ ਦਾ ਮਾਹੌਲ ਬਣਾਓ।

or.tone_instruction: Use standard Odia with a respectful, literary tone. Reference Odisha's rich cultural heritage, classical dance (Odissi), and regional traditions.

genre_notes.drama: ପାରିବାରିକ ମୂଲ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ସାମାଜିକ ବନ୍ଧନ ପ୍ରକଟ କରନ୍ତୁ।
genre_notes.comedy: ହାସ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ହାଲ୍କା ମୁଡ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରନ୍ତୁ।
genre_notes.horror: ଭୟ ଏବଂ ରହସ୍ୟ ପରିବେଶ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରନ୍ତୁ।

default.tone_instruction: Translate naturally and culturally appropriately. Avoid literal, word-for-word translation. Preserve tone and emotion.

genre_notes.drama: Focus on human connections and values.
genre_notes.comedy: Present humor and wit in a culturally resonant way.
genre_notes.horror: Create an atmosphere of fear and mystery.

hinglish_rewrite.instruction: The input is in Hinglish (mixed Hindi-English). Identify English loan words that have well-known Hindi equivalents and replace them. Keep technical terms or brand names in English. Output should be predominantly Hindi with only necessary English terms retained.

examples.hinglish: yeh ek amazing thriller series hai
examples.output: यह एक अद्भुत रोमांचक श्रृंखला है

examples.hinglish: Detective ne murder case solve kiya
